purpose: Validate Ultra-Mini STRC (aa 1075-1775, 701 aa) as the aggressive C-term-only therapeutic construct. Structural superposition (mini_strc_interface_preservation.json) shows sub-Angstrom RMSD at the TMEM145 binding pocket vs clinical 700-1775 mini. These AF3 multimer jobs are the direct empirical test.
sequence_verification: Ultra-Mini sequence extracted from two independent sources and verified identical: (1) slice of mini_STRC_700_1775 FASTA positions 376-1076; (2) MMCIFParser extraction from job-h-strc-cterm-only.cif chain A (701 residues). TMEM145 sequence verified against job2-mini-complex.cif chain B (493 residues).

strc_ultramini_x_tmem145_full.description: Ultra-Mini STRC 1075-1775 (701 aa) + full TMEM145 (493 aa)
strc_ultramini_x_tmem145_full.success_criteria: ipTM >= 0.40 (matches job2-mini-complex value of 0.43); STRC interface residues concentrate in aa 1603-1749; does not drift to N-terminal false-positive zone like Job 1 did
strc_ultramini_x_tmem145_full.hypothesis_impact: if passes -> Mini-STRC delivery score 4->5; Ultra-Mini becomes preferred clinical candidate; unlocks OHC-specific Prestin promoter integration
strc_ultramini_x_tmem145_full.rejection_meaning: if ipTM < 0.25 or interface shifts away from 1603-1749 -> LRR domain (aa 700-1075) provides essential structural context; revert to clinical 700-1775 as final construct

strc_ultramini_x_tmem145_gold.description: Ultra-Mini STRC 1075-1775 + TMEM145 GOLD domain only (aa 1-165, Derstroff-style pruning)
strc_ultramini_x_tmem145_gold.success_criteria: ipTM >= 0.70 (matches Derstroff et al. 2026 pruned result of 0.91 for full STRC + GOLD)
strc_ultramini_x_tmem145_gold.hypothesis_impact: confirms Ultra-Mini retains the GOLD-binding interface when partner is pruned to its minimal functional domain; orthogonal confirmation of the full-TMEM145 result

strc_ultramini_homodimer.success_criteria: inter-chain contact residues at 5 A cutoff; if STRC self-assembles like PCDH15 tip link, oligomerization domain should be in 1075-1775 (same range TMEM145 uses)
strc_ultramini_homodimer.hypothesis_impact: negative result (no contacts, ipTM < 0.20 like prior homodimer jobs) -> STRC likely does not self-assemble or requires non-ARM domain (removed by Ultra-Mini); positive result -> Ultra-Mini retains dimerization capacity, safety margin for in vivo assembly

how_to_submit: AlphaFold Server (alphafoldserver.com): upload each JSON via 'Import from JSON' or paste sequences manually from af3_jobs_sequences.fasta. Daily limit: 20 jobs. Model seed 42 is used across all submissions for reproducibility vs prior jobs.
